heading: Information from Secretary
label: 4106 Information from Secretary
notes: Amendments1992—Subsec. (b)(4). , substituted “exceed” for “exceeds”.Pub. L. 102–550, § 317(a)(2)Subsec. (d)(3). , added par. (3).Pub. L. 102–550, § 303
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (b)(4). , substituted “exceed” for “exceeds”.Pub. L. 102–550, § 317(a)(2)Subsec. (d)(3). , added par. (3).Pub. L. 102–550, § 303

children.heading: Information to owners terminating affordability restrictions
children.label: a Information to owners terminating affordability restrictions
children.text: The Secretary shall provide each owner who submits a notice of intent to terminate the low-income affordability restrictions on the housing under with information under this section not later than 6 months after receipt of the notice of intent. The information shall include a description of the criteria for such termination specified under and the documentation required to satisfy such criteria.section 4108 of this titlesection 4108 of this title

children.heading: Information to owners extending low-income affordability restrictions
children.label: b Information to owners extending low-income affordability restrictions

children.heading: Preservation values
children.label: 1 Preservation values
children.text: A statement of the preservation value of the housing determined under paragraphs (1) and (2) of .section 4103(b) of this title

children.heading: Preservation rent
children.label: 2 Preservation rent
children.text: A statement of the preservation rent for the housing as calculated under .section 4104(b) of this title

children.heading: Federal cost limits
children.label: 3 Federal cost limits
children.text: A statement of the applicable Federal cost limits for the market area (or relevant local market area, if applicable) in which the housing is located, which shall explain the limitations under sections 4109 and 4110 of this title of the amount of assistance that the Secretary may provide based on such cost limits.

children.heading: Federal cost limit analysis
children.label: 4 Federal cost limit analysis
children.text: A statement of whether the aggregate preservation rents exceed the Federal cost limits and a direction to the owner to file a plan of action under or submit a second notice of intent under subsection (d), whichever is applicable.section 4107 of this title

children.heading: Availability to tenants
children.label: c Availability to tenants
children.text: The Secretary shall make any information provided to the owner under subsections (a) and (b) available to the tenants of the housing, together with other information relating to the rights and opportunities of the tenants.

children.heading: Filing
children.label: 1 Filing
children.text: Each owner of eligible low-income housing that elects to transfer housing under shall submit to the Secretary, in such form and manner as the Secretary prescribes, notice of intent to sell the housing under . To be eligible to prepay the mortgage or voluntarily terminate the insurance contract on the mortgage, an owner of housing for which the preservation rents exceed the Federal cost limits under shall submit to the Secretary notice of such intent. The provisions of sections 4111 and 4113 of this title shall apply to any owner submitting a notice under the preceding sentence.section 4110 of this titlesection 4110 of this titlesection 4105(b) of this title

children.heading: Timing
children.label: 2 Timing
children.text: A second notice of intent under this subsection shall be submitted not later than 30 days after receipt of information from the Secretary under this section. If an owner fails to submit such notice within such period, the notice of intent submitted by the owner under shall be void and ineffective for purposes of this subchapter.section 4102 of this title

children.heading: Filing with the State or local government, tenants, and mortgagee
children.label: 3 Filing with the State or local government, tenants, and mortgagee
children.text: Upon filing a second notice of intent under this subsection, the owner shall simultaneously file such notice of the intent with the chief executive officer of the appropriate State or local government for the jurisdiction within which the housing is located and with the mortgagee, and shall inform the tenants of the housing of the filing.
